blurb: UK technology trade association with regular AI-policy analysis. Launch coverage uses first-party EU/UK AI regulation briefings.

publications.title: EU releases final version of AI Code of Practice
publications.summary: techUK summarises the EU GPAI Code of Practice and says it will continue analysing how to support members under the Code.

publications.title: UK Government puts forward plans to regulate AI
publications.summary: techUK briefs members on the UK Government response to the AI White Paper consultation and the pro-innovation/context-based regulatory approach.

notes: launch_harvest 2026-06-27: direct fetch HTTP 200 on EU Code first-party resource.
